news.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
news.summary: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers. The advance follows a strong start to the year for U.S. small-caps.

news.title: Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, blocks Trump order
news.summary: President Donald Trump attended oral arguments in the case, underscoring his staunch opposition to granting automatic citizenship to many immigrants' babies. Trump: "I don't think it's fair" to give citizenship to babies of illegal immigrants.

news.title: AWS puts $1 billion into new AI unit to embed engineers with customers, joining growing wave
news.summary: AWS FDEs will look to leave behind self-sufficient teams with new AI solutions and capabilities in a matter of weeks, the company said.

news.title: Oil prices set for steep monthly drop as Trump, Iran issue mixed messages on talks in Qatar
news.summary: The moves come as oil traders monitor the prospect of U.S.-Iran talks in Doha on Tuesday. The talks are expected to focus on Iran's nuclear program.

news.title: Supreme Court strikes down limits on political parties' campaign spending, in win for GOP
news.summary: President Donald Trump took a victory lap after the ruling. He wrote on Truth Social that it was "A BIG WIN FOR REPUBLICANS"

news.title: Insurers shifted roof-replacement costs onto homeowners thanks to a new federal rule — just in time for hail and hurricane season
news.summary: Those who find extensive damage to their roofs might be stuck between two options. File an insurance claim, which could trigger a premium increase, or cough up the cash for the necessary repairs or replacement.

news.title: What’s a ‘soft’ off day? How to take one without getting in trouble at work.
news.summary: CNN.com will feature iReporter photos in a weekly Travel Snapshots gallery. Visit CNN.com/Travel each week for a new gallery of snapshots from around the world.

news.title: Your Fourth of July hamburger meat was likely imported — and you’re right to have a beef with that
news.summary: The real reason your backyard BBQ is expensive has nothing to do with the supermarket. The real reason is that it's a lot more expensive than you think.

news.title: Retiring abroad sounds amazing. What could possibly go wrong?
news.summary: We hear about the older Americans who bask in apparent paradise far from home. But that’s not the whole story. The older Americans we hear about are often in their 60s, 70s and 80s.

news.title: Warsh says he’s determined to slay inflation. Investors want to know if he really means it.
news.summary: New Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh isn’t a stranger on Wall Street. The mystery to investors is whether he’s committed as he sounds to stamp out U.S. inflation.
